case_title: SHAKER I. DAHUD ET AL VS. SANTOS HILARIO ESTRELLA GONGORA ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF DAHUD, SHAKER I. DBA HURLEY HOTEL MIRANDA, K. , PROP.MGR. AS TO DEFENDANT GONGORA, SANTOS HILARIO ESTRELLA
